title: ranunculus retusidens
intro: Ranunculus retusidens, also known as the sharp-leaved buttercup, is a plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. The medicinal properties of Ranunculus retusidens are rooted in its alkaloid content, which has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it a potential remedy for skin issues and infections. Ranunculus retusidens can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and it is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat skin conditions and wounds.
